---
title: "UIAO_128 — Education Program"
subtitle: "Narrative-Led Agency Onboarding"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
description: "Comic-led agency onboarding. Education builds the mental model that makes the Training program stick."
categories: [canon, programs, education, narrative, comics]
aspirational: true
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical spec at
[`core/canon/specs/program-education.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/core/canon/specs/program-education.md).
The authoritative copy lives in `core/`. If you want the short
narrative explanation instead, read the
[companion walkthrough](../narrative/program-education.qmd).
:::

{{< include ../../core/canon/specs/program-education.md >}}
